download.mp3Desc: Tọgharịa ma budata dị ka MP3

player.webAudioUnsupported:
Ndo
Ihe nchọgharị gị anaghị akwado WebAudio.
Ihe nchọgharị ndị a na-akwado bụ Chrome, Firefox, Safari, na Edge

settings.title: Ntọala

engines.bassoonDesc: Na-akwado naanị .xm / .mod. Ọ na-adaba na Chiptune3 wee gaa na FFmpeg maka ụdị ndị ọzọ.
engines.chiptune3Desc: Na-akwado ụdị tracker 20+ (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …). Ọ na-adaba na FFmpeg maka ụdị ndị ọzọ.
engines.ffmpegDesc: Na-atụgharị ụdịdị ọdịyo niile gaa na MP3. Nkwado sara mbara karị, mmalite nwayọọ.

settings.engineDesc: Họrọ igwe ọdịyo ị ga-eji. A na-atụ aro Chiptune3 maka nkwado usoro tracker kacha mma.

comments.title: Ihe ndị gbara okwu
comments.disabled: A na-atụgharị okwu na ụlọ ọrụ a.

intro.title: Ntuziaka

tutorialMock.labelTrackMode: Ọnụọgụ egwu + ọnọdụ egwu ugbu a
tutorialMock.labelActions: Chekwa faịlụ · Isi mmalite ModArchive · Nkọwa egwu
tutorialMock.legendEmpty: --- / 00 / … = Ihe efu (enweghị ndetu / enweghị ngwa / enweghị mmetụta)
tutorialMock.labelFormatFilter: Pịa “Format” ka imepe panel nhọrọ ọtụtụ ihe · Nhọrọ nchacha Channel/Size · Nhazi ọtụtụ mpaghara
tutorialMock.annotModeSwitch: Bọtịnụ ọnọdụ na-egosipụta naanị akara ngosi — ịpị ya na-atụgharị n'ụdị egwuregwu anọ
tutorialMock.labelFilter: Ntọpụta ebe: Niile / Ọkacha mmasị / Akụkọ ihe mere eme  |  Igbe ọchụchọ: chọọ site na aha faịlụ ma ọ bụ aha
tutorialMock.annotPlaylist: Pịa ahịrị ọ bụla ka ịmalite ịkpọ · Ahịrị ọ bụla na-egosi: nọmba · aha · ụdị · ọwa · nha · aha faịlụ
tutorialMock.annotScopes: Ụdị ebili mmiri nke ọwa ọ bụla — ahịrị nke ọ bụla na-egosi ebili mmiri nke otu ọwa ọdịyo n'oge ozugbo
tutorialMock.annotAccount: Ndebanye aha n'efu · Naanị ihe ndị ị hụrụ n'anya na akụkọ ihe mere eme ka echekwara · Enweghị nsochi, enweghị mgbasa ozi

intro.tutorialStep5Body: Mepụta akaụntụ efu iji mepee atụmatụ ndị ọzọ:
intro.tutorialClosing: Nụrụ egwu nke ọma — ma nwee obi ụtọ na egwu ahụ!
intro.tutorialStep3Body: Tracker Player na-eweta egwu ndụ site na ihe ngosi abụọ na-eme n'oge n'ezie:
intro.tutorialLead: Ntuziaka a na-edu gị aka n'ime atụmatụ ọ bụla nke Tracker Player, site na ịchọta egwu mbụ gị ruo n'ịhazi ihe ọkpụkpọ ahụ maka usoro ọrụ gị.
intro.introWelcome: Ụzọ gị iji nụ egwu tracker n'ụdị 68+ — site na MOD na XM a ma ama ruo MPTM na UMX nke oge a — na-enweta site na nnukwu nchịkọta dị na
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Tracker Player nwere ike ịhazigharịa nke ọma. Banye na ntọala site na akara ngwaọrụ (elu bar) ma ọ bụ ntị Ntọala (akụkụ aka ekpe):
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Egwuregwu bụ obi nke Tracker Player. Jiri oghere ịchọta n'elu ịchọta egwu site na aha faịlụ ma ọ bụ aha. N'okpuru oghere ịchọta, ị ga-ahụ otu ihe nzacha siri ike:
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Pịa egwu ọ bụla dị na ndepụta egwu ka ịmalite ịkpọ ya. Ihe ọkpọ egwu na-ebunye ozugbo — ọtụtụ faịlụ na-amalite ịkpọ n'ime ihe na-erughị otu nkeji. Mgbe egwu na-akpọ, ị ga-ahụ:
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Ndu ọkachamara: Na ekwentị, tinye Tracker Player na ihu ụlọ gị maka ahụmịhe dị ka ngwa nke ala. Ọ na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma dị ka Weebụ Ọganihu Na-aga n'ihu nwere nchekwa n'ịntanetị.
intro.changelogIntro: Tracker Player etolitela nke ukwuu site na mmalite ya dị ka ihe egwu MOD/XM dị mfe. Nke a bụ usoro oge nke ihe ndị dị mkpa:
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Egwu ọ bụla dị na Tracker Player nwere URL na-adịgide adịgide, nke enwere ike ịkekọrịta. Detuo njikọ ahụ site na ebe adreesị nke ihe nchọgharị gị mgbe egwu na-akpọ — ọ ga-adị ka /song/123456/filename.mod. Ziga ya ndị enyi gị, tinye ya na mgbasa ozi ọha, ma ọ bụ debe ya maka oge ọzọ. Njikọ ahụ ga-emepe otu egwu ahụ mgbe niile.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Ruọ taa, egwu tracker ka na-aga n'ihu n'ime obodo demoscene zuru ụwa ọnụ na n'etiti ndị na-enwe mmasị na kọmputa ochie. Tracker Player na-atụ anya iwebata ọtụtụ mmadụ n'ụdị nka a pụrụ iche nke na-ebu akụkọ ihe mere eme nke egwu kọmputa, site na interface ọgbara ọhụrụ na mmekọrịta dị mfe.
intro.introWelcomeNote: Tracker Player bụ ihe karịrị naanị ihe egwu — ọ bụ ikpo okwu egwu tracker zuru oke nwere ihu ọhụụ mara mma, nke na-emeghachi omume, ihe ngosi usoro n'oge, oscilloscopes ọwa ọ bụla, na ngwaọrụ ndị e mere iji mee ka ịchọta na ịnụ ụtọ egwu tracker dị mfe na ngwaọrụ ọ bụla.
intro.introWhatBody1: Tracker Player bụ ọrụ nkeonwe mepere emepe nke e mere iji weta ịma mma nke egwu tracker na ihe nchọgharị ọgbara ọhụrụ. Ọ bụghị igwe ọdịyo ọhụrụ, kama ọ bụ njikọ miri emi na mmepe nke abụọ nke e wuru n'elu ọrụ mepere emepe dị mma dị adị, na-emepụta usoro ahụmịhe onye ọrụ zuru oke.
intro.introWhatBody3: Site ọchụchọ na nzacha egwu, ngosipụta ụda, sistemụ akaụntụ onye ọrụ ruo nkwado mba ụwa, Tracker Player ewulitela usoro zuru oke nke atụmatụ ndị gbara gburugburu isi egwu ahụ, na-achọ ikwe ka ndị ọrụ nwee obi ụtọ nke egwu tracker pụrụ iche na-enweghị nzụlite teknụzụ ọ bụla.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Vue.js meta-framework na-eme ka anyị niile frontend na backend rụọ ọrụ. Nuxt na-enye server-side rendering maka ibe ngwa ngwa na SEO, Nitro server maka ụzọ API, njikọ SQLite database, na nkewa koodu akpaghị aka maka arụmọrụ kacha mma.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , ihe nchọgharị Amiga MOD/XM tracker nke Steffest dere na JavaScript dị ọcha, na-emegharị ahụmịhe egwu tracker oge ochie n'ụzọ ziri ezi. N'ịgbakwunye na ntọala a, ọrụ a ji nwayọọ nwayọọ tinye Chiptune3 (igwe WebAssembly pụrụ iche nke dabere na libopenmpt) na ntụgharị FFmpeg n'akụkụ sava, na-agbasawanye nkwado usoro site na MOD/XM mbụ gaa na usoro 68 karịa.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player wuru n'elu ubu nke ihe omume open-source dị egwu. Ọbá akwụkwọ egwu anyị niile 135,400+ sitere na The Mod Archive — ebe nchekwa egwu tracker kacha mma na ịntanetị. Anyị nwere ekele miri emi nye onye ọ bụla nyere aka mere ka ọrụ a kwe omume.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Egwu tracker (nke a makwaara dị ka egwu modul ma ọ bụ egwu MOD) bụ ụdị egwu dijitalụ pụrụ iche nke pụtara na ngwụsị afọ 1980 na Commodore Amiga. N'adịghị ka MP3 ma ọ bụ ọdịyo na-asọ asọ, faịlụ tracker nwere ma akara egwu (ndetu, ụkpụrụ, mmetụta) yana ihe nlele ngwá egwu — dị ka faịlụ ọrụ egwu nke nwere ihe niile. Nke a na-eme ka faịlụ tracker dị obere ma na-enye ohere maka mgbagwoju anya egwu dị ịtụnanya.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Usoro CSS nke na-ebu ọrụ ụzọ nke eji eme ụdị. Usoro akara nhazi nke Tailwind na-enyere usoro ụdị 16 anyị aka — agba ọ bụla, onyinyo, na oke na-agbanwe ka ọ dabara na ụdị na-arụ ọrụ site na njirimara omenala CSS sitere na nhazi Tailwind anyị.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Usoro JavaScript na-aga n'ihu nke e ji arụ ọrụ UI anyị nke dabere na akụkụ. Vue's Composition API, usoro mmeghachi omume ya, na akụkụ otu faịlụ mere ka o kwe omume iwu na idobe ihe ngosi ọkpụkpọ dị mgbagwoju anya na koodu dị ọcha, nke nwere akụkụ.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: Usoro ngwa nchịkọta dabere na LLVM nke na-achịkọta koodu C/C++ gaa na WebAssembly. Anyị na-eji Emscripten chịkọta libopenmpt anyị gbaziri — gụnyere waveform_processor emegharịrị — n'ime modul WASM otu faịlụ nke na-arụ ọrụ na ọsọ fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ nke mbụ n'ime AudioWorklet nke ihe nchọgharị.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Ebe ntanetị kachasị mma maka egwu ndị e depụtara, nke nwere ihe karịrị modul 150,000 sitere n'aka ọtụtụ puku ndị na-ese ihe n'ime afọ iri anọ. Mod Archive bụ naanị ebe a na-enweta egwu dị n'ọbá akwụkwọ anyị, ọ bụkwa ụlọ ọrụ a na-apụghị ịgbanwe maka obodo ndị na-edepụta egwu.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: API eserere ihe osise nke ihe nchọgharị nke na-egosipụta ụdị nlele tracker anyị na-eme n'oge. A na-ebunye data ndetu ụkpụrụ na kwaaji WebGL na 60 fps, na-emegharị n'ụzọ ziri ezi ọdịdị ndetu na-agbagharị nke ndị editọ tracker oge gboo dịka ProTracker na FastTracker II.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: Nkọwapụta W3C Web Audio API nke na-enye ohere ịhazi ụda olu na-enweghị oge ọdịda, na-enweghị nkwụsị na eriri oge pụrụ iche. AudioWorklet bụ ebe igwe Chiptune3 anyị na-agba libopenmpt WASM arụchara, n'adabereghị na eriri UI bụ isi, na-eme ka ịkpọ ụda na-aga n'ihu n'agbanyeghị ihe omume interface.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Emebere ya site na Steffest. Ọ bụ mmegharị ọzọ nke eziokwu, nke dabere na ihe nchọgharị, nke ndị na-egwu egwu MOD na XM oge gboo — ProTracker na FastTracker II — nke e dere kpamkpam na JavaScript. BassoonTracker na-enye ụda egwu eziokwu, na-ekpo ọkụ nke malitere ọrụ a, yana nkwado zuru oke maka MOD 4-ọwa oge gboo na XM ọtụtụ-ọwa gụnyere envelopu, ihe nzacha, na mmetụta.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Ụdị a bụ nke Karsten Obarski's Ultimate Soundtracker malitere na 1987, wee gbasaa ngwa ngwa site na demoscene — otu omenala dị iche iche ebe ndị na-eme mmemme, ndị na-egwu egwu, na ndị na-ese ihe na-asọ mpi ịmepụta ọrụ ọdịyo na anya mara mma. N'ime iri afọ ndị gafeworonụ, ọtụtụ ụdị tracker pụtara, nke ọ bụla na-agbasi mbọ ike ịgafe ihe ndị a na-eme: ọwa ndị ọzọ, mmetụta ka mma, ngwá egwu ndị a na-emepụta, nkwado VST plugin, na ọbụna ikike ịgwakọta zuru oke. Taa, mpaghara tracker ka na-arụ ọrụ n'ụwa niile, a na-ewepụtakwa egwu ọhụrụ kwa ụbọchị na saịtị dịka The Mod Archive.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Nke ndị na-enye aka OpenMPT mepụtara ya. Ọbá akwụkwọ egwu tracker mepere emepe nke a na-akpọghachi, na-akwado usoro modul 68+ na izi ezi na-enweghị atụ. Anyị gbanwere koodu C nke libopenmpt — tinye usoro waveform_processor nke na-enweta data PCM nke ọwa ọ bụla n'ime igwe na-agwakọta tupu mmepụta ikpeazụ — wee chịkọta ya na WebAssembly site na Emscripten. Ihe nrụpụta WASM anyị rụziri dochie ngwugwu mbụ e bugoro nke e tinyere na Chiptune3, na-eme ka oscilloscopes ọwa ọ bụla rụọ ọrụ ma bụrụ isi ihe na-ekpebi ụdị 68+ niile.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: Emebere ya DrSnuggles — ọ́bá akwụkwọ JavaScript mepere emepe nke na-ekpuchi libopenmpt n'ime AudioWorklet maka ịkpọghachi usoro tracker 68+ na ihe nchọgharị. Maka ọrụ a, anyị mere ka ihe nhazi AudioWorklet ahụ pụta iche iji wepụta data ụdị ebili mmiri nke ọwa ọ bụla (na-enye ike oscilloscopes ọwa ọtụtụ), tinyere njikwa uru akpaghị aka, ma mee ka njikwa ọsọ ọsọ nke ọnọdụ ịgba ọsọ sie ike maka ịgbanwe egwu ngwa ngwa. Chiptune3 bụ àkwà mmiri dị n'etiti Web Audio API nke ihe nchọgharị na ike ịtọgharị nke ụlọ ọrụ libopenmpt anyị rụziri, ọ bụkwa engine anyị na-atụ aro ka ị jiri ya.
tutorialStep1Filters: Nchọcha Ụdị — Pịa ka i mepee grid nhọrọ ọtụtụ nke ụdị niile dị. Jiri bọtịnụ ndị e debere mbụ iji họrọ ngwa ngwa otu: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 All (ụdị 56), ma ọ bụ All Supported.
Nza nke Ọwa — Mee ka ọ dị warara site na ọnụọgụ ọwa: ọwa 4 (oge MOD ochie), ọwa 8, ma ọ bụ ọwa 8+ (ọtụtụ egwu ọgbara ọhụrụ).
Nha nhata Size — Nha nhata site nke faịlụ: obere (<100KB), etiti, ma ọ bụ buru ibu (>1MB).
Ihe nzacha aha Tracker — Pịnye aha tracker (dịka, "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") iji chọta egwu emere na ngwanrọ a kapịrị ọnụ.
Nhọrọ nhazi — Hazie ndepụta egwu site na ID, aha, aha faịlụ, nha, ma ọ bụ ụbọchị mgbanwe, na usoro nrịgo ma ọ bụ nrịdata.
Nhọrọ Isi Mmalite — Gbanwee n'etiti Egwu Nile, Ihe Ị Hụrụ n'anya, na Akụkọ Egwu Ị Gụrụ.
tutorialStep2Details: Ozi Egwu — Aha, onye na-eme egwu, ụdị, ọnụọgụ ọwa, na nọmba egwu egosiri n'elu njikwa ọkpụkpọ.
Egwu/Kwụsị & Ntụgharị — Bọtịnụ egwu/kwụsị buru ibu nwere ihe nhọrọ ụdị egwu: Gbanwee (nke ọ bụla), N'usoro (otu n'otu), Gbaa Otu, ma ọ bụ Kwụsị Mgbe Nke A Na-aga.
Egwu Na-esote — Wụpụ gaa na egwu na-esote n'onwe gị, ma ọ bụ hapụ ụdị ịkpọgharị ị họọrọ ka ọ na-ahụ maka ya.
Olu & Ọganihu — Gbanwee olu site na ihe ndọpụta, chọọ egwu ahụ, ma hụ oge gafere / fọdụrụ.
Bọtịnị Ịhụnanya — Pịa obi iji tinye egwu na ndị mmasị gị (chọrọ akaụntụ).
Budata — Chekwa faịlụ tracker mbụ n’ime ngwaọrụ gị.
Njikọ ModArchive — Mepee ibe egwu ahụ na The Mod Archive maka nkọwa ndị ọzọ na nkwupụta ndị otu.
Modal Ozi Egwu — Lelee nkọwa zuru ezu: aha ihe nchọta, ụbọchị, ogologo oge, ụdị ihe nchekwa, egwu ndị ọzọ, ọnụọgụ ọwa, ngwa egwu, ihe nlele, usoro, ụkpụrụ, na ozi ọ bụla sitere n'aka onye dere egwu.
tutorialStep3Details: Nlele Ụdị — Hụ data ụkpụrụ tracker n'ezie ka ọ na-agba ọsọ n'oge, nke e mere na WebGL maka arụmọrụ dị nro. Ogidi ọ bụla na-anọchite anya ọwa, ahịrị ọ bụla bụ ihe omume ndetu. Ihe ndetu, ngwá egwu, olu, na iwu mmetụta niile ka egosiri — dịka ọ dị na onye nchịkọta tracker oge gboo. Pịa ntụgharị ụkpụrụ iji gbanwee n'etiti nhazi kwụ ọtọ (ọdịnala) na nhazi kwụ n'akụkụ (sara mbara).

Oscilloscopes nke Ọwa Ọ bụla — N'okpuru ihe ọkpụkpọ ahụ, ị ga-ahụ grid nke ngosipụta ụdị ebili mmiri — otu maka ọwa ọdịyo ọ bụla dị na egwu ahụ. Ndị a na-arụ ọrụ site na nhazi ụdị ebili mmiri nke C-level anyị wuru n'ime libopenmpt, nke na-ewepụta ọdịyo ọwa nke ọ bụla tupu ngwakọta ikpeazụ. Lekwa ka ụdị ebili mmiri nke ọwa ọ bụla na-agbagharị n'oge n'ezie, na-enye gị akara ngosi anya nke otu esi arụ egwu ahụ — ịgbà ụkwụ na ọwa 1, bass na ọwa 2, lead na ọwa 3, na ihe ndị ọzọ.
Enwere ike ịgbanwuo ma ọ bụ gbanyụọ ihe ngosi abụọ ahụ na Ntọala maka arụmọrụ ma ọ bụ mmasị.
tutorialStep4Settings: Igwe ọkpụkpọ — Họrọ n'etiti BassoonTracker (MOD/XM ochie), Chiptune3 (atụrụ ndụ, ụdị 20+), ma ọ bụ FFmpeg (nkwado ụdị kachasị ukwuu site na ntụgharị n'akụkụ sava).

Isiokwu — Họrọ n'ime isiokwu agba iri na isii. Isiokwu ọkụ gụnyere Ọkụ, Retro (Solarized), Ocean (Teal), Forest (Green), Strawberry (Pink), Blue, Pink, Cyan, Orange, na Gray. Isiokwu ọchịchịrị gụnyere Ọchịchịrị, Midnight (Deep Purple), Golden (Black & Gold), Purple, Red, na Green.
Asụsụ — Asụsụ interface 52. Nhọrọ gị na-echekwa na mpaghara.
Volum — Tọọ ọkwa ụda olu na ndabara ma ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ, manye ya na egwu ọ bụla.
Ịdọghachi Ọkwa Ụda — Na-emegharị ụda ọkpọ egwu na-akpaghị aka maka ịge ntị na-agbanwe agbanwe (na-arụ ọrụ na mbụ).
Ọnụọgụgụ Loop Kasị Elu — Egwu Tracker na-ejikarị loop ruo mgbe ebighị ebi. Tọọ ọnụọgụgụ loop kasị elu iji gbochie ịkpọghachi na-enweghị njedebe (ndabara: 1).
Ngbanaka Ngosipụta — Gosi ma ọ bụ zoo ngosipụta nke oke, nlele ụkpụrụ, na ngalaba mmalite.
tutorialStep5Details: Ọkacha mmasị — Gbaa obi n'egwu ọ bụla iji chekwaa ya na ndepụta ọkacha mmasị gị, nke enwere ike ịnweta site na nhọrọ isi iyi ndepụta egwu.
Akụkọ Egwu Egwuru — Egwu ọ bụla ị na-egwu na-edekọ na-akpaghị aka. Chọgharịa akụkọ gị iji chọpụta egwu ọzọ.
Mmekọrịta Ngwaọrụ Ọzọ — Ihe ị hụrụ n'anya na akụkọ ihe mere eme gị na-eso gị n'ofe ngwaọrụ mgbe ị banyere.
Nchebe — Akaụntụ gị na-echekwa naanị ihe ndị ị hụrụ n'anya na akụkọ ihe mere eme. Ọ dịghị data nkeonwe a na-anakọta ma ọ bụ kesaa.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: Ọ́bá akwụkwọ nke 135,400+ faịlụ egwu tracker gbasara 68+ ụdị, site na MOD 4-channel ruo epics 256-channel.
Ihe owuwu atọ: BassoonTracker (JS ochie), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM), na FFmpeg (ntụgharị n'akụkụ sava) — ahọpụtara na-akpaghị aka maka faịlụ ọ bụla.
Nlele usoro ihe nchọta n'ezie nke e mere na WebGL — lee ka ndetu si na-agafe dịka ọ dị na onye nchịkọta usoro ochie.
Oscilloscope ụdị ebili mmiri nke ọwa ọ bụla — hụ mmepụta ụda nke ọwa ọ bụla dị ka ebili mmiri na-akpụ akpụ na ndụ, nke e ji usoro mwepụta ebili mmiri C pụrụ iche rụọ ọrụ.
Nhazi nzaghachi nke na-emegharị nke ọma na ihuenyo ọ bụla: desktọpụ, mbadamba, ma ọ bụ ekwentị — gụnyere ụdị usoro kwụ ọtọ maka ihuenyo sara mbara.

Asụsụ interface 52 — na-eme ka egwu tracker nweta ndị na-ege ntị n'ụwa niile.
Ọchụchọ siri ike, nhọrọ ọtụtụ ihe na nzacha usoro nwere bọtịnị ndị edoziri (Bassoon, Major Tracker, Chiptune3, All Supported), nzacha ọnụọgụ ọwa, na nhazi ọtụtụ mpaghara.
Sistemụ akaụntụ nwere ihe ndị ị hụrụ n'anya na akụkọ egwuregwu — mekọrịta ọba akwụkwọ gị n'ofe ngwaọrụ gị niile.
Njikọ egwu na-ekekọrịta na-adịgide adịgide — egwu ọ bụla na-enweta URL pụrụ iche dịka /song/123456/filename.mod.
Budata faịlụ tracker mbụ ma ọ bụ tọghata na MP3 na otu pịa.
Ogwe ozi egwu na-egosi ihe ndekọ: aha, onye na-eme egwu, onye na-achọpụta, ụdị, ọwa, ngwa egwu, ihe nlele, usoro, ụkpụrụ, na ozi etinyere.
Enweghị ụgwọ ọ bụla, mepere emepe, ma ndị obodo na-achịkwa ya — enweghị mgbasa ozi, enweghị nleba anya, enweghị mgbochi ịkwụ ụgwọ.

trackInfo.title: Aha
trackInfo.noMeta: Enweghị nkọwa ọdịnaya maka egwu a.

alerts.favoritesFailed: Ọdara imelite ihe ndị ahụrụ n'anya.
alerts.loginRequired: Biko banye aka iji hụ egwu ndị ị hụrụ n'anya.
